query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.images, c.name as categoryName 
FROM products p 
LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 150004 
ORDER BY c.name, p.name
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.images, c.name as categoryName 
FROM products p 
LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 150004 
ORDER BY c.name, p.name
